title: hieracium tubulosum
intro: Hieracium tubulosum, also known as wolf's bitter or mountain hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family that is native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium tubulosum include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Hieracium tubulosum is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever and respiratory issues.
